title: Game Scene specification document
description: Schema validating the Game Scene specification.

id.title: Scene ID
id.description: The unique ID that is used by the program to identify the game scene.

title.title: Scene title
title.description: The Scene title to be shown on different game screens.

description.title: Scene description
description.description: The Scene description to be shown on different game screens.

objective.title: Scene objective
objective.description: The Scene objective to be shown on different game screens.

prereqs.title: Prerequisities
prereqs.description: List of scenes that will be uploaded prior to scene load.

cleanup.title: Cleanups
cleanup.description: Cleanups to be done before scene upload

processors.title: Scene Processors
processors.description: List of processors used for processing the game logic.

maps.title: Scene Maps
maps.description: List of maps used for scene.

dialogs.title: Scene Dialogs
dialogs.description: List of dialogs used for scene.

templates.title: Scene Templates
templates.description: List of templates used in the scene.

entities.title: Scene Entities
entities.description: List of entities used in the scene.

handlers.title: Scene Event Handlers
handlers.description: List of entities used in the scene.
